subject: npmx Weekly #8
headline: npmx Weekly #8
intro: Exciting updates are here with the release of v0.4.0! Join the growing npmx community as we celebrate enhancements and new features that elevate user experience.

topics.title: Version Release v0.4.0
topics.summary: The latest v0.4.0 release introduces improved translations, UI enhancements, and significant accessibility updates, ensuring a more robust user experience.

topics.title: User Interface Enhancements
topics.summary: With PR #1672, users can now enjoy a multi-select feature on the search page, enhancing usability during package comparisons with a persistent selection counter and improved accessibility.

topics.title: Community Engagement
topics.summary: The npmx community is buzzing with excitement over the new release, sharing experiences and encouraging contributions on platforms like Bluesky, fostering a sense of collaboration and support.
